# Available Repository AI Skills

This directory contains repository-level AI skill files. Each skill is a descriptive `.SKILL.md` file that guides automated agents or contributors.

Skills in this repo
- `create-slickgrid-package.SKILL.md` — guidance for creating a new package/external resource in the monorepo.
- `skill-webmcp.SKILL.md` — pointers for WebMCP (AI Toolkit) docs, code, demos and tests.

To add a new skill, create a `.SKILL.md` file and add a short entry here.
